selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap

node_data.name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap
node_data.short_description: Protein-rich tuna pasta salad with cucumber and cherry tomatoes tossed in olive oil; versatile for wraps or quick bowls.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Serve as a smoky wrap by spooning the tuna pasta salad into a whole-grain tortilla with a handful of greens, or enjoy as a ready-to-eat pasta salad in a bowl.
node_data.nutrition_note: Protein from tuna, complex carbohydrates from pasta, and healthy fats from olive oil provide a balanced base. Cucumber and cherry tomatoes add fiber and micronutrients. Canned tuna can be high in sodium, so consider tuna in water and drain well or control portion size to manage sodium and calories.

selected_nodes.reasoning: The Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap is the only option that fits the 'finger food' criteria, as it is explicitly described as a wrap that can be eaten by hand.
